name: clv_momentum
label: CLV order-flow continuation · 5m
status: retired: Continuation direction robustly negative (z=-9.2, 0/5 windows). Kept as the documented rejection; the inverse clv_fade carries the edge.
method: A 5m bar that closes in the extreme of its range on above-median volume reflects intrabar order-flow imbalance that persists one bar; predict next-bar direction in the same direction.
risk: Paper only until leak test + walk-forward pass. Agent-authored.
